# Datapolis Copilot Instructions

## Project Context
- Base Django project only (`datapolis_project`).
- Current phase: infrastructure setup.
- No Django apps have been created yet.

## Ground Rules
- Keep changes small, clear, and easy to review.
- Do not create Django apps unless explicitly requested.
- Do not add frontend, templates, auth flows, or product/business logic yet.
- Prefer minimal, local-development-friendly defaults.
